sentences.arabic: تَسْمَعُ الأُمُّ المُوسِيقَى العَرَبِيَّةَ فِي البَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Majka sluša arapsku muziku kod kuće.
sentences.translationEn: The mother listens to Arabic music at home.

sentences.arabic: المُوسِيقَى العَرَبِيَّةُ لَهَا إِيقَاعٌ خَاصٌّ وَجَمِيلٌ.
sentences.translation: Arapska muzika ima poseban i lijep ritam.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic music has a special and beautiful rhythm.

sentences.translation: Pjevanje je dio proslave i svečanosti.
sentences.translationEn: Singing is part of celebrations and occasions.
